rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0001
rows.name:
Hey, aren't you the knights
from Iira? Boy, does your
fame ever precede you!

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0002
rows.name:
I hear not only did you repel that
Eejit or whatever, but then they
gave you a title for it, right?

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0003
rows.name:
I guess that makes you Iira's
bravest knights? Well, I'm still
Gula's bravest, so watch it.

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0004
rows.name:
Still though, imagine that!
A noble title! You're living
my dream right now!

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0005
rows.name:
From this point on, you will
be judged by your actions,
so don't forget that.

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0006
rows.name:
...I mean, you'd never forget
that, right? Sorry, I guess I'm
just saying the obvious here.

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0007
rows.name:
Not that you're that old or anything!
OK, I'll shut up now. Let's keep
pushing each other, yeah?

rows.label: tlk70000120_10_msg0008
rows.name:
Like fellow knights! We have to live
up to the title. Even if in my case
I just gave it to myself, ahahaha!
